controls.remediation_template: Implement model-agnostic or intrinsic explainability techniques, document decision logic for stakeholders, and ensure explanations are accessible to non-technical users in context of use.
controls.framework_name_en: OECD AI Principles
controls.framework_name_ar: مبادئ منظمة التعاون الاقتصادي والتنمية للذكاء الاصطناعي

controls.control_title: Design UX to avoid cognitive risks
controls.control_text_full: Did you design User Experience with human psychology in mind to avoid the risk of confusion, confirmation bias, or cognitive fatigue?
controls.intent_summary: AI interfaces must be designed to minimize psychological harm, such as manipulation through bias or overload, ensuring human autonomy and informed interaction.
evidence_signals: UX usability testing reports
Bias mitigation in interface design
Cognitive load assessments
User feedback on clarity and fatigue
Design guidelines aligned with human factors
evidence_anti_signals: No UX testing conducted
Interfaces encouraging confirmation bias
Overwhelming information density
No consideration of cognitive effects
controls.remediation_template: Conduct human-centered design reviews focusing on cognitive load, decision fatigue, and bias risks. Integrate findings into UI/UX standards and validate with diverse user groups.
controls.framework_name_en: OECD AI Principles
controls.framework_name_ar: مبادئ منظمة التعاون الاقتصادي والتنمية للذكاء الاصطناعي

controls.control_title: Establish privacy impact measurement mechanism
controls.control_text_full: Have you established a measurement or assessment mechanism for privacy impact?
controls.intent_summary: Organizations must implement measurable methods to evaluate how AI systems affect privacy, including data minimization, consent, and surveillance risks.
evidence_signals: Privacy Impact Assessment (PIA) reports
Metrics tracking data access and retention
Consent management logs
Anonymization effectiveness scores
Regular privacy audits
evidence_anti_signals: No formal PIA process
Generic privacy claims without metrics
No tracking of consent revocation
Absence of privacy KPIs
controls.remediation_template: Implement a standardized Privacy Impact Assessment (PIA) framework with quantifiable indicators, integrate it into the AI lifecycle, and conduct periodic reviews.
controls.framework_name_en: OECD AI Principles
controls.framework_name_ar: مبادئ منظمة التعاون الاقتصادي والتنمية للذكاء الاصطناعي

controls.control_title: Review data management against human-centric values and KSA regulations
controls.control_text_full: Has the data management approach been reviewed based on human-centric values and according to data regulations within the KSA?
controls.intent_summary: Data handling practices must align with human rights principles and Saudi Arabia’s local data protection laws, ensuring cultural and legal compliance.
evidence_signals: Cross-reference of data practices with KSA regulations
Human rights impact notes in data governance
Local legal compliance certificates
Cultural sensitivity reviews
Data stewardship policies referencing KSA law
evidence_anti_signals: No reference to KSA regulations
Generic global policies without localization
No cultural or ethical review records
Assumptions of international compliance
controls.remediation_template: Align data management policies with Saudi Arabia’s data protection laws and human rights norms. Document legal and cultural alignment assessments for auditability.
controls.framework_name_en: OECD AI Principles
controls.framework_name_ar: مبادئ منظمة التعاون الاقتصادي والتنمية للذكاء الاصطناعي

controls.control_title: Flag data privacy/protection issues in collection and processing
controls.control_text_full: Is there an established mechanism that flags issues related to data privacy or protection in the process of data collection and processing?
controls.intent_summary: Automated or procedural mechanisms must detect and alert on privacy violations during data ingestion and processing stages.
evidence_signals: Real-time privacy anomaly alerts
Data classification tags with compliance checks
Automated consent validation workflows
Privacy violation logs
Integration with data protection tools
evidence_anti_signals: Manual-only privacy checks
No alerting system for breaches
Privacy flags disabled in production
No logging of flagged issues
controls.remediation_template: Deploy automated privacy monitoring tools that trigger alerts for unauthorized data use, missing consent, or sensitive data exposure during ingestion and processing.
controls.framework_name_en: OECD AI Principles
controls.framework_name_ar: مبادئ منظمة التعاون الاقتصادي والتنمية للذكاء الاصطناعي

controls.control_title: Ensure AI system security and data integrity under adversarial conditions
controls.control_text_full: Are there processes to ensure that AI systems are secure and keep information safe, confidential, and private, as well as the integrity of the processed information even under hostile or adversarial conditions?
controls.intent_summary: AI systems must be hardened against attacks, ensuring confidentiality, integrity, and availability of data and decisions even when targeted maliciously.
evidence_signals: Adversarial testing reports
Encryption and access control logs
Penetration test results
Model poisoning defenses
Data integrity checksums
evidence_anti_signals: No adversarial testing performed
Default or weak access controls
No encryption of sensitive data
Claims of 'security' without evidence
controls.remediation_template: Implement end-to-end security controls including encryption, access governance, adversarial robustness testing, and continuous monitoring for data tampering or model manipulation.
controls.framework_name_en: OECD AI Principles
controls.framework_name_ar: مبادئ منظمة التعاون الاقتصادي والتنمية للذكاء الاصطناعي

controls.control_title: Assess data quality and source reliability
controls.control_text_full: Has the quality and source of the acquired data been assessed through set processes?
controls.intent_summary: Data used in AI systems must be evaluated for accuracy, provenance, and reliability using documented, repeatable processes.
evidence_signals: Data lineage documentation
Source credibility scoring
Quality validation reports
Provenance metadata logs
Data cleaning audit trails
evidence_anti_signals: No data source documentation
Assumed data quality without validation
No metadata tracking
Use of unvetted public datasets
controls.remediation_template: Establish a data quality framework with defined metrics (accuracy, completeness, freshness) and source vetting procedures, documented and reviewed at each lifecycle stage.
controls.framework_name_en: OECD AI Principles
controls.framework_name_ar: مبادئ منظمة التعاون الاقتصادي والتنمية للذكاء الاصطناعي

controls.control_title: Assess post-training data analysis capability
controls.control_text_full: Has there been an assessment on whether an analysis can be performed post training and testing the data?
controls.intent_summary: Organizations must ensure that data remains analyzable after model training to support auditing, debugging, and compliance monitoring.
evidence_signals: Post-training data access logs
Audit-ready data snapshots
Versioned training datasets
Reproducibility documentation
Data retention policies aligned with audit needs
evidence_anti_signals: Training data deleted after deployment
No version control of datasets
Cannot reproduce model results
No retention policy for training data
controls.remediation_template: Preserve versioned training datasets and metadata for auditability. Ensure systems allow retrospective analysis without compromising privacy or security.
controls.framework_name_en: OECD AI Principles
controls.framework_name_ar: مبادئ منظمة التعاون الاقتصادي والتنمية للذكاء الاصطناعي

related_icaire_terms.term_en: Test Dataset (or Test Data, Test Set)
Validation Dataset (or Validation Data, Validation Set)

controls.control_title: Consider diversity and inclusion in datasets
controls.control_text_full: Has diversity and inclusion of the dataset at hand been considered or reviewed?
controls.intent_summary: Training datasets must be evaluated for representation across demographic, geographic, and cultural dimensions to prevent bias and exclusion.
evidence_signals: Demographic breakdown of training data
Bias audit reports on representation
Inclusion criteria documentation
Underrepresented group analysis
Diversity scorecards
evidence_anti_signals: No demographic analysis
Homogeneous datasets
Claims of 'representative' without data
No review of underrepresented groups
controls.remediation_template: Conduct regular diversity audits of training data using demographic and contextual metrics. Actively source underrepresented data and document inclusion efforts.
controls.framework_name_en: OECD AI Principles
controls.framework_name_ar: مبادئ منظمة التعاون الاقتصادي والتنمية للذكاء الاصطناعي

related_icaire_terms.term_en: Training Dataset (or Training Data, Training Set)
Test Dataset (or Test Data, Test Set)
Validation Dataset (or Validation Data, Validation Set)

controls.control_title: Analyze proxies for sensitive features
controls.control_text_full: Has an analysis process been developed for the proxies of the sensitive features?
controls.intent_summary: Indirect indicators of sensitive attributes (e.g., zip code as proxy for race) must be identified and mitigated to prevent discriminatory outcomes.
evidence_signals: Proxy variable identification logs
Correlation analysis reports
Mitigation strategies for proxies
Fairness testing on proxy variables
Documentation of proxy removal or adjustment
evidence_anti_signals: No identification of proxies
Assumption that 'non-sensitive' features are safe
No testing for indirect discrimination
No documentation of proxy analysis
controls.remediation_template: Systematically identify and test for proxy variables linked to protected attributes. Apply mitigation techniques (e.g., adversarial debiasing, feature removal) and document rationale.
controls.framework_name_en: OECD AI Principles
controls.framework_name_ar: مبادئ منظمة التعاون الاقتصادي والتنمية للذكاء الاصطناعي

controls.control_title: Ensure data integrity, quality, and accuracy are measured
controls.control_text_full: Is there an established mechanism that measures whether the integrity, quality, and accuracy of data collection and its sources have been evaluated and data is up to date?
controls.intent_summary: Continuous monitoring must be in place to verify that data remains accurate, complete, and timely throughout the AI lifecycle.
evidence_signals: Data freshness metrics
Accuracy drift detection logs
Automated data quality dashboards
Source validation schedules
Data staleness alerts
evidence_anti_signals: No data quality monitoring
Static datasets used indefinitely
No alerts for data degradation
Manual checks only
controls.remediation_template: Implement automated data quality monitoring with thresholds for accuracy, completeness, and timeliness. Trigger alerts and retraining workflows when thresholds are breached.
controls.framework_name_en: OECD AI Principles
controls.framework_name_ar: مبادئ منظمة التعاون الاقتصادي والتنمية للذكاء الاصطناعي

controls.control_title: Review dataset for personal data presence
controls.control_text_full: Has the data been reviewed to check if personal data is evident within the dataset?
controls.intent_summary: All datasets must be screened for the presence of personal or identifiable information to ensure appropriate handling under privacy regulations.
evidence_signals: Personal data identification logs
PII detection tool outputs
Data classification tags
Anonymization review records
Data inventory with sensitivity labels
evidence_anti_signals: No screening for personal data
Assumption that 'aggregated' means anonymous
No labeling of sensitive fields
No review documentation
controls.remediation_template: Deploy automated PII detection tools on all datasets and maintain a log of findings. Apply appropriate controls (anonymization, access restrictions) based on classification.
controls.framework_name_en: OECD AI Principles
controls.framework_name_ar: مبادئ منظمة التعاون الاقتصادي والتنمية للذكاء الاصطناعي
